raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Pileſahta Eetas
bps peepilditas ar Puſcheem
n Meitinaſm/ kas us winna
elaſm jaktehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS
ebaot: Tapehz ka tas brihnisch-
is ier preeſch tcho atliktufchu
anſchu Azzim ſchinnis Dee-
âg/ buhtu tas arridsan brih-
iſchis mannas Azzis? fakka
tas KUNGS Zebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS
ebaot: Naugi/ Es atpestischu
annus Laudis no Auſtruma
Semmes/ un no tahs Semmes/
ur ta Saule no-eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es attveddischn tohs /
a teem buhs Jeruſalemes Wid-
ui dſihwoht. Un tee buhs man
ar Laudim/ un es buhſchu teem
ar Deewu/ eekſch Pateefbas un
Caifnibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS
ebaot: Laid juhs Rohkas
tiprinajabs / kas juhs tchohs
Wahrds eſtat klaustifschi ſchin.
is Deenas/ no to Praueeschu
Muttes/ kas bija tai Deena/
ad tas Pamats ta Namma ta
UNGA Zebaot irr liſts tappis/
n tas Deewa Nams taptu uhs.
elts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo preeſch ſchahm Dee-
ahm bija to Jilweku Alga welti/
n to Lohpu Alga bija neveeka/
n teem/ kas tsgabje un eegabje
e bija Meera ta Eenatdneeka
ch/ jo es fuhttiju wiſsus Jilwe-
us ikweena prett ſawu Tu-
aku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet nu es prett ſcheem
atliktufſcheem Laudim ne turre-
ſchohs ta winna Laika/ fakka
tas KUNGS Zebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta Sehcla labbi ie-
dohſecs. Tas Wiha- Kohfs
dohſtawus Augkus/ un taSeim-
me iedohs ſawu Augunu/ un
tahs Debbeſis dohs ſawu Ra-
gju/ un es liſſchu khein atliktu-
scheem Laudim wiſfu ſcho ee-
mantoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas notiks/ itt ka juhs
no ta Naimma Juha/ un no ta
Iſraeta Naimia effeet weens
Lahsts bijuſchi/ ſtarp teem Pa-
ganeem/ tapatt es juhs iſglahb-
ſchu/ ka juhs buhs pahr Sweh-
tumu buht/ ne bihſteetees/ laid
juhsas Rohkas ſtiprinajabs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot: Itt ka es efmu doh-
mais jume Launa darriht/ kad
juhu Tehwi mannis apfaitina-
ja/ fakka tas KUNGS Zebaot: Un tas man ne ier ſchehl bijts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapatt dohmajn es atka-
ſchinnis Deenas labba darriht
pee Jeruſalemes un pee ta Nam-
ma Juha/ ne bihſteetees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schahs irr tahs Leetas/
kas jums irr jadarru/ runnajeet
pateeki ikweens ar jawu Tuwa-
ka/ teefajeet pateeft/ un netteet
meerigu Teesu juhsas Wahrtis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ue dohnajeet weens
prett ehtru Lannu juha Sirde/
un ue mubfojeet nepateefu Sweh-
reſchani/ jo schahs irr wiſsus
tahs
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
